what: Rollback readiness for FSC-2417: feasible=True, risk=LOW — verdict=FEASIBLE
why: FSC-2417 is LOW-risk and can be safely rolled back by deploying the previous change set version via Copado with minimal operational friction. No destructive changes, schema migrations, or high-complexity logic are present in this deployment, making rollback a straightforward reversal process. The ops team should verify the previous version is available in Copado and execute the standard rollback procedure, then confirm functionality in a staging environment post-rollback.

rollback_steps: Deploy previous change set version via Copado
